datasets.label: Berlin bike repair shops
datasets.detail: Geofabrik Berlin GPKG filtered on the bicycle shop class and normalized into CSV and GeoJSON for supply mapping.

datasets.label: VBB station access points
datasets.detail: Official UMBW export normalized from semicolon-delimited legacy CSV into UTF-8 CSV and GeoJSON.

datasets.label: VBB GTFS stops
datasets.detail: Weekly GTFS static stops exported to CSV and GeoJSON for stop/station joins.

datasets.label: Google Places ratings
datasets.detail: API key and billing are still required before ratings and review counts can be fetched.

datasets.label: Yelp ratings
datasets.detail: Developer credentials are still required before Yelp review metadata can be fetched.

datasets.label: Station footfall
datasets.detail: No verified public bulk passenger-count file is staged yet; corridor strength still needs a proxy or licensed feed.

notes: The dashboard map still uses lightweight seed layers for scoring and rendering stability.
Raw market files now live under data/raw and can be promoted into a heavier-weight scoring pipeline later.
Google Places, Yelp, and station footfall remain placeholders until credentials or a verified bulk source are available.
